title: Lawrence of Arabia
tmdbOverview: During World War I, English officer Thomas Edward 'T.E.' Lawrence sets out to unite and lead the diverse, often warring, Arab tribes to fight the Turks.
synopsis: Released in 1962, Lawrence of Arabia is a adventure, history and war film from United Kingdom. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.3 on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 1960s and genre rankings. It carries a PG certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
